home.hero_title: Central Europe's leading language education partner
home.hero_sub: Since 1990, ILC has been the trusted name for premium language textbooks — serving schools, teachers, and institutions across Czech Republic & Slovakia.
home.w1_d: Every title personally reviewed by certified language educators.
home.w2_d: Simple invoice-based billing. No card required for institutions.
home.w3_d: Delivered across Czech Republic & Slovakia within 3–5 days.
home.w4_d: 10%–25% off on orders of 10+ copies of any title.

home.promo_title: Ready to stock your school library?
home.promo_sub: Join 2,000+ institutions already ordering with ILC Books.
home.publishers_title: Books from the world's best publishers
home.testimonials_sub: Trusted by educators across Central Europe
home.mission_text: To make world-class language learning materials accessible to every school in Central Europe — with expert guidance, fair pricing, and exceptional service.

about.hero_sub: From a small Brno bookshop to Central Europe's leading language textbook distributor.
about.mission_text: To make world-class language education materials accessible to every school in Central Europe — with expert curation, transparent pricing, and outstanding service.
about.vision_text: A Central Europe where every student has access to the best language learning materials regardless of their school's location or budget.
about.v1_d: Every decision we make starts with one question: does this help students learn better?
about.v2_d: Transparent pricing, honest advice, and relationships built on trust since 1990.
about.v3_d: We partner only with the world's most reputable educational publishers.
about.v4_d: We are part of the Czech & Slovak educational community — not just a supplier.
about.team_sub: The educators and experts behind ILC
about.network_sub: Part of the International House World Organisation
about.publishers_sub: We carry titles from 50+ world-leading publishers
about.timeline_sub: Three decades of shaping language education in Central Europe
about.cta_sub: We work with schools, booksellers, and institutions across CZ & SK.

timeline_items.title: ILC Founded
timeline_items.desc: ILC Czechoslovakia s.r.o. established in Brno as a specialist importer of language educational materials.

timeline_items.title: First 100 Schools
timeline_items.desc: Rapid growth across Moravia — first bulk contracts with school boards.

timeline_items.title: International House
timeline_items.desc: Joined the prestigious International House World Organisation network.

timeline_items.title: Slovakia Expansion
timeline_items.desc: Launched full distribution across Slovakia — leading supplier in Central Europe.

timeline_items.title: 1,000 Partner Schools
timeline_items.desc: Crossed the milestone of 1,000 active school partners.

timeline_items.title: First Online Catalog
timeline_items.desc: Launched digital catalog — teachers could browse and order online.

timeline_items.title: 5,000+ Titles
timeline_items.desc: Expanded to 5,000+ language titles from 50+ international publishers.

timeline_items.title: 25th Anniversary
timeline_items.desc: 2,500+ school partners. New distribution centre opened in Brno.

timeline_items.title: E-commerce Launch
timeline_items.desc: Full online ordering, invoicing and order tracking for schools.

timeline_items.title: ILC Books App
timeline_items.desc: Mobile-first platform — 35 years of expertise, now in your pocket.

contact.hero_sub: We're here to help schools, teachers, and institutions find the right books.
contact.step1_desc: 5,000+ titles from the world's best publishers
contact.step2_desc: B2B invoicing — no credit card required
contact.step3_desc: Delivery across CZ & SK within 3–5 days
contact.form_success: Message sent! We'll reply within 1 business day.

faqs.q: How do I place an order?
faqs.a: Browse our catalog, add books to your cart, then go to Checkout. We support invoice-based B2B ordering — no card needed.
Yes! Orders of 10+ copies of any title receive 10–25% discount. Larger orders get custom pricing — contact us.
We deliver across Czech Republic and Slovakia within 3–5 business days. Express options are available.

faqs.q: Can I request a physical catalog?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Fill in the form below or call us and we'll send you our latest printed catalog.
Yes — we've been serving Slovak schools since 1998 with full delivery and invoice support.
